name: VTIL_SetResponseContent
title: VTIL_SetResponseContent
syntax: long VTIL_SetResponseContent(dbNode workingSetMaster, byte vtFunction, pg VT12 pgWithNewContent); // form 1
long VTIL_SetResponseContent(dword addressWorkingSetMaster, byte vtFunction, pg VT12 pgWithNewContent); // form 2
long VTIL_SetResponseContent(dbNode vt, dbNode workingSetMaster, byte vtFunction, pg VT12 pgWithNewContent); // form 3
long VTIL_SetResponseContent(dbNode vt, dword addressWorkingSetMaster, byte vtFunction, pg VT12 pgWithNewContent); // form 4
description: The function changes the content of the next VT response VT12 sent by the VT IL to allow fault injection.

parameters.name: vt
parameters.description: VT simulation node to apply the function.

parameters.name: workingSetMaster
parameters.description: Receiver of the VT12 response message.

parameters.name: addressWorkingSetMaster
parameters.description: Address of the Receiver of the VT12 response message.

parameters.name: vtFunction
parameters.description: The function refers to the response with this VT function value.

parameters.name: pgWithNewContent
parameters.description: This message replaces the VT12 response of the VT IL.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
